_readme: Per-game profiles. 'tdp' fields are watts for RyzenAdj (sustained/boost). 'source' notes where values came from. Edit this file directly, or use the app's 'Add / Edit Game' button. Add your own games freely — this file is yours.

Forza Horizon 6.source: rogallylife.com (ROG Xbox Ally X / X20), Z2 Extreme

profiles.label: Max Quality (Plugged In)
profiles.notes: FSR Performance mode. ~60fps avg. Set VRAM to 6GB+ in Armoury Crate.

profiles.label: Balanced (Battery)
profiles.notes: Same settings as above, ~50fps avg with dips into 40s.

profiles.label: Battery Saver
profiles.notes: FSR Balanced mode. ~60fps avg, lower visual quality.

Left 4 Dead 2.source: rogallylife.com (ROG Xbox Ally X / X20), Z2 Extreme

profiles.label: Recommended
profiles.notes: 60fps+ avg at just 13W. Enable Steam Input for controller detection. VRAM 4GB+.

Wo Long: Fallen Dynasty.source: rogallylife.com (ROG Xbox Ally X / X20), Z2 Extreme

profiles.label: Max Quality
profiles.notes: Known stuttery PC port. 40-50fps avg with dips to 30s even at full power. VRAM 8GB+.

profiles.label: Battery Saver
profiles.notes: 40-50fps avg, dips to 30s. Same graphics settings as Max Quality.
